name: Lojja
overview: Jaya, a meek homemaker, has been subjected to relentless verbal abuse by her husband over the years. As she confronts society's stifling expectations of women to raise her voice against the abuse, her life becomes a battleground in her quest to regain her self-esteem.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Lojja (লজ্জা) | Priyanka Sarkar | Anujoy | Aditi Roy | 22 March | hoichoi
